title: Sulin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Sulin_XWA.jpg|thumb|right|280px|[[Bandit Squadron]] escorts the Sulin group]]
'''Sulin''' was the name given to a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cargo convoy made up of twelve [[MB-C1 medium transport]]s. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE Experimental Project]], the Alliance needed to learn more about the dangerous [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] starfighters this project was fielding, so they decided to lure these fighters into a trap.

Cargo group Sulin was put into place using remote controlled technology. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] deployed a large force of Experimental fighters and two [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport]]s to destroy the convoy, the Rebels sprang their trap. Using the newly released [[Ion pulse]] warheads, six Rebel pilots of [[Bandit Squadron]] controlled by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Yamarus]] and flying [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], attacked the enemy. [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] was the #2 craft. The Rebels disabled most if not all of the Imperial craft, and then [[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifter]] group [[Atlas]] stole one of each craft type. Several ships in cargo group Sulin were destroyed or damaged, but they succeeded in trapping the Empire's valuable new starfighters. They fled the area after the mission was completed, and Yamarus was able to use the valuable intelligence to stop the experimental project.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player saves six Mobquet Transports after waiting for them to leave for several minutes, he/she can earn five-hundred bonus points. They can earn up to one thousand points for saving all of the transports. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kupalo]] will then commend the player for their efforts.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
